noActionReasons: Drifted files are still active documentation surfaces.
docs/api/ and coverage/ are ignored generated output, not historical documentation to quarantine.
spec/future/*.md files are explicitly future-scoped proposals.
ADR files are historical architecture records and should remain in place.

generatedOutputDirectories.recommendation: Regenerate with pnpm docs; do not hand-edit.
Regenerate with tests; do not curate as documentation.
